title: Agrinium
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Agrinium.png|thumb|right|Agrinium]]
'''Agrinium''' was an [[Wikipedia:Alloy|alloy]] based on [[Aluminium/Legends|aluminium]] used to create [[Solar sailer/Legends|solar sails]], and was highly resistant to all forms of [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]].

Applied to [[Droid/Legends|droid]] armor, it created an extremely effective barrier against many forms of damage, and was often used on lightweight repair droids that maintained the sails on many deep-space sailing ships of the [[Old Sith Wars]] era.

Also, agrinium was used sometimes to make strong and lightweight melee weapon and tool grips.

==Appearances==
